no: Ports the original Baldur's Gate 1 PC voicesets to Enhanced Edition 2.6+ as selectable player character soundsets. Includes 17 sets: 9 female and 8 male personalities.
sum: Baldur's Gate II Voice Pack for Infinity Engine Enhanced Edition games version 2.6 and above.

co.n: Baldur's Gate Voice Pack for EE 2.6+
co.tp2n: Baldur's Gate Voice Pack for EE 2.6+

advisories.reason: Both add voice content to BG1 characters. VVE provides full AI voiceover for all dialogue; ZG provides curated voice packs. May cause audio inconsistencies if both installed.
